revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:旧暦11月]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: [[Category:Pages with blank templates]] <noinclude> [[Category:Blank templates]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: 六曜を最下段に移動; 理由は[[Template‐ノート:旧暦1月]]に記載

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[Template:Old Lunar Calendar1January]] to [[Template:Old Lunar Calendar November]]
revision.text: {| class="floatright navbox" style="width:150px; text-align:center;" |- ! colspan="6" |[[11月 (旧暦)|旧暦11月]]（霜月） |- style="font-size:88%" |[[11月1日 (旧暦)|1]] |[[11月2日 (旧暦)|2]] |[[11月3日 (旧暦)|3]] |[[11月4日 (旧暦)|4]] |[[11月5日 (旧暦)|5]] |[[11月6日 (旧暦)|6]] |- style="font-size:88%" |[[11月7日 (旧暦)|7]] |[[11月8日 (旧暦)|8]] |[[11月9日 (旧暦)|9]] |[[11月10日 (旧暦)|10]] |[[11月11日 (旧暦)|11]] |[[11月12日 (旧暦)|12]] |- style="font-size:88%" |[[11月13日 (旧暦)|13]] |[[11月14日 (旧暦)|14]] |[[11月15日 (旧暦)|15]] |[[11月16日 (旧暦)|16]] |[[11月17日 (旧暦)|17]] |[[11月18日 (旧暦)|18]] |- style="font-size:88%" |[[11月19日 (旧暦)|19]] |[[11月20日 (旧暦)|20]] |[[11月21日 (旧暦)|21]] |[[11月22日 (旧暦)|22]] |[[11月23日 (旧暦)|23]] |[[11月24日 (旧暦)|24]] |- style="font-size:88%" |[[11月25日 (旧暦)|25]] |[[11月26日 (旧暦)|26]] |[[11月27日 (旧暦)|27]] |[[11月28日 (旧暦)|28]] |[[11月29日 (旧暦)|29]] |[[11月30日 (旧暦)|30]] |- style="font-size:88%" |大安 |赤口 |先勝 |友引 |先負 |仏滅 |}<noinclude> [[Category:暦表テンプレート|旧11]] [[Category:Jawiki date templates]] [[Category:original templates]] [[Category:bump February 13, 2025 bump]][[ja:template:旧暦11月]][[Category:bump February 13, 2025 bump]] </noinclude>

{| class="floatright navbox" style="width:150px; text-align:center;" |- ! colspan="6" |[[11月 (旧暦)|旧暦11月]]（霜月） |- style="font-size:88%" |[[11月1日 (旧暦)|1]] |[[11月2日 (旧暦)|2]] |[[11月3日 (旧暦)|3]] |[[11月4日 (旧暦)|4]] |[[11月5日 (旧暦)|5]] |[[11月6日 (旧暦)|6]] |- style="font-size:88%" |[[11月7日 (旧暦)|7]] |[[11月8日 (旧暦)|8]] |[[11月9日 (旧暦)|9]] |[[11月10日 (旧暦)|10]] |[[11月11日 (旧暦)|11]] |[[11月12日 (旧暦)|12]] |- style="font-size:88%" |[[11月13日 (旧暦)|13]] |[[11月14日 (旧暦)|14]] |[[11月15日 (旧暦)|15]] |[[11月16日 (旧暦)|16]] |[[11月17日 (旧暦)|17]] |[[11月18日 (旧暦)|18]] |- style="font-size:88%" |[[11月19日 (旧暦)|19]] |[[11月20日 (旧暦)|20]] |[[11月21日 (旧暦)|21]] |[[11月22日 (旧暦)|22]] |[[11月23日 (旧暦)|23]] |[[11月24日 (旧暦)|24]] |- style="font-size:88%" |[[11月25日 (旧暦)|25]] |[[11月26日 (旧暦)|26]] |[[11月27日 (旧暦)|27]] |[[11月28日 (旧暦)|28]] |[[11月29日 (旧暦)|29]] |[[11月30日 (旧暦)|30]] |- style="font-size:88%" |大安 |赤口 |先勝 |友引 |先負 |仏滅 |}<noinclude> [[Category:暦表テンプレート|旧11]] [[Category:Jawiki date templates]] [[Category:original templates]] [[Category:bump February 13, 2025 bump]][[ja:template:template:旧暦11月]][[Category:bump February 13, 2025 bump]] </noinclude>
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[Template:Old Lunar Calendar November]] to [[Template:Lunar November]]: Text replacement - "Old Lunar Calendar " to "Lunar "
Immanuelle moved page [[Template:Lunar November]] to [[Template:Lunisolar November]]: Text replacement - "Lunar November" to "Lunisolar November"

Adding [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]][[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]][[Category:qq]] on (CatAlot)
Copying from [[Category:Original templates]] to [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.
Bot: Replaced ill templates with appended |12=draft and created corresponding redirect pages.
Bot: Replaced ill templates with appended |12=draft and created corresponding redirect pages.
Copying from [[Category:Original templates]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:暦表テンプレート]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Jawiki date templates]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Jawiki date templates]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
doing this because it is quite important for standardization in my corrections system
Text replacement - "{{draft categories|" to "<noinclude> {{Draft categories| [[Category:templates with draft categories]]"
Copying from [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]] to [[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: add simplewiki draft link to ill templates
Bot: add simplewiki draft link to ill templates
Copying from [[Category:Jawiki date templates]] to [[Category:qq]][[ja:Template:旧暦{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
5 revisions imported: Bot: import full history from ja:Template:旧暦11月 up to rev 53020289
Immanuelle moved page [[Template:旧暦11月]] to [[Template:Lunisolar November]] without leaving a redirect: Bot: merge import
Moving the </noinclude> to the bottom so it is not transcluded
Bot: replace {{ill}} with enwiki link via Wikidata
Bot: remove deleted category Jawiki date templates
Bot: remove deleted category Original templates
Text replacement - "1月27日 (旧暦)|" to "1月27日 (旧暦)|1=January 27 (Lunisolar)|2=ja|3=1月27日 (旧暦)|4=zh|5=正月廿七|6=ko|7=음력 1월 27일|"
Text replacement - "November 27 (Lunisolar)|" to "November 27 (Lunisolar)|1=November 27 (Lunisolar)|2=ja|3=11月27日 (旧暦)|4=zh|5=十一月廿七|6=ko|7=음력 11월 27일|"
81 revisions imported: importing the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar templates but renamed so I can fork them for the Islamic calendar
Immanuelle moved page [[Template:Islamic November]] to [[Template:Islamic Dhu al-Qadah]]: Text replacement - "November" to "Dhu al-Qadah"

Text replacement - "</noinclude>↵↵[[Category:qq]]-->[[Category:Islamic calendar templates]]" to "
[[Category:qq]][[Category:Islamic calendar templates]] </noinclude>"
Text replacement - "|大安↵|赤口↵|先勝↵|友引↵|先負↵|仏滅" to ""
Text replacement - "月 (旧暦)|lt=" to "|comment=I do not know of any abbreviations|qq="
removing the bad interwikis. Translation templates are good to keep but not the interwikis to wrong pages
Bot: sync {{ill}} inter-wikis with master list
Bot: sync {{ill}} inter-wikis with master list

Copying from [[Category:Islamic calendar templates]] to [[Category:qq]][[Category:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] doing this in the process of adding them into the month categories using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q6128075)
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 4 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23468259453|time triggered pipeline]]
Bot: remove [[Category:Sn crud]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24314731306|commit triggered pipeline]]

Bot: strip HTML comments; consolidate 5 interlanguage link(s) into wikidata link template (has duplicate-language pairs) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24945162515|manual triggered pipeline]]
